jtbds.title: Process building permit application
jtbds.situation: resident or contractor submits building permit application for construction, renovation, or addition; clerk must review completeness, route to plan reviewer, schedule inspections, and issue permit once approved
jtbds.motivation: ensure construction meets code while issuing permit within statutory timeframe
jtbds.outcome: permit issued with conditions; inspection schedule established; fees collected
success_criteria: completeness review within 5 business days
plan review completed within statutory timeframe (varies by jurisdiction: 30-60 days)
permit issued within 3 days of approval
all fees collected before issuance

jtbds.title: Investigate and resolve municipal code violation
jtbds.situation: resident complaint or officer observation identifies potential code violation (blight, unpermitted work, zoning violation, noise); officer must investigate, notify property owner, allow cure period, and escalate to citation or abatement if unresolved
jtbds.motivation: bring property into code compliance while preserving due process rights of property owner
jtbds.outcome: violation resolved through voluntary compliance or formal enforcement action; file closed
success_criteria: notice of violation sent within 5 days of inspection
cure period provided per ordinance (typically 30 days)
citation issued if not cured within period
abatement costs recovered if city-performed

jtbds.title: Issue or renew business license
jtbds.situation: new or existing business applies for municipal business license; clerk must verify business information, check zoning compliance, collect fees, and issue license; renewal requires updated information and fee payment
jtbds.motivation: register businesses operating in city limits, collect revenue, and ensure zoning compliance
jtbds.outcome: business license issued or renewed; fee collected; city business registry updated
success_criteria: license issued within 10 business days of complete application
zoning compliance verified before issuance
fees collected per city fee schedule
certificate of occupancy verified for commercial locations

jtbds.title: Manage public works service order
jtbds.situation: resident reports infrastructure issue (pothole, broken streetlight, water main break, storm drain blockage); dispatcher creates service order, assigns crew, tracks completion, and closes with documentation
jtbds.motivation: restore public infrastructure to safe operating condition within response time targets
jtbds.outcome: service order completed; repair documented; resident notified; asset management system updated
success_criteria: emergency issues (water main break, safety hazard) dispatched within 1 hour
standard issues dispatched within 3 business days
completion documented with before/after photos
asset management system updated

jtbds.title: Process encroachment permit
jtbds.situation: contractor or utility company needs permit to work within city right-of-way (excavation, lane closure, utility installation); permit requires traffic control plan review, bond, and inspection schedule
jtbds.motivation: allow necessary work in ROW while protecting public safety and minimizing traffic disruption
jtbds.outcome: encroachment permit issued; traffic control plan approved; bond on file; inspections scheduled
success_criteria: traffic control plan reviewed within 5 days
permit issued before work begins
bond or insurance certificate on file
final inspection completed at project close

jtbds.title: Process zoning variance or conditional use permit
jtbds.situation: property owner seeks relief from zoning standards (setback, height, use) via variance or conditional use permit; officer must review application, issue CEQA/SEPA notice, schedule public hearing, prepare staff report, and implement board decision
jtbds.motivation: provide due process for property rights relief while protecting neighboring properties and general plan consistency
jtbds.outcome: variance granted with conditions or denied with findings; decision recorded; GIS updated
success_criteria: public notice published 10+ days before hearing
staff report completed before hearing
written decision issued within 10 days of hearing
conditions of approval recorded against title

jtbds.title: Process parks facility reservation
jtbds.situation: community group or individual requests reservation of park pavilion, sports field, or facility for event; manager must check availability, collect deposit, issue permit, and coordinate setup/cleanup
jtbds.motivation: ensure equitable community access to parks facilities while recovering costs through permit fees
jtbds.outcome: reservation confirmed; deposit collected; facility permit issued; calendar updated
success_criteria: availability confirmed and reservation made within 3 business days
deposit collected before event
permit conditions communicated to applicant
post-event facility inspection completed

jtbds.title: Manage city procurement and contract award
jtbds.situation: department needs goods or services above informal bid threshold; must follow competitive bid process, evaluate proposals, present to city council for award, execute contract, and manage vendor performance
jtbds.motivation: procure services competitively and transparently in compliance with public contracting requirements
jtbds.outcome: contract awarded to best-value vendor; council approval obtained; contract executed
success_criteria: solicitation published per public contracting code
evaluation criteria applied consistently
council award resolution adopted
contract executed before work begins
prevailing wage posting if public works

jtbds.title: Issue special event permit
jtbds.situation: event organizer applies for permit to hold public event (parade, festival, race) on city streets or in parks; permit requires coordination with police, fire, public works, and may require traffic control plan and EMS standby
jtbds.motivation: facilitate community events safely while managing city liability and resource deployment
jtbds.outcome: special event permit issued; interdepartmental coordination complete; post-event debrief conducted
success_criteria: application received 30+ days before event
all department sign-offs obtained before permit
insurance certificate on file
post-event debrief report filed

jtbds.title: Manage utility connection and service order
jtbds.situation: property owner or developer requests connection to water, sewer, or stormwater utility; supervisor must verify system capacity, calculate connection fees, schedule tie-in inspection, and activate service
jtbds.motivation: connect new customers to utility infrastructure while protecting system capacity and collecting connection fees
jtbds.outcome: utility connection completed; connection fees collected; meter set; service activated
success_criteria: capacity analysis completed before approval
connection fee calculated and collected
tie-in inspection conducted before backfill
meter installed and service activated within 5 business days of inspection
